# `StrSplit`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, VIC20, PET, X16, OK64  
**Parameters:** `a,a,b`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>StrSplit( [ input string ], [ output string list ], [ split token ] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[ input string ] - Input string</li>
    <li>[ output string list ] - Output string list separated by #0</li>
    <li>[ split token ] - Token to split string with (i.e "key_space", ";" etc)</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>
Splits a string into null-terminated substrings with a separator token.
</p>

<h3>Example</h3>
<code>
    // Splits "myString" separated by space ($20) to "list"
    strsplit(myString,list,key_space);

    zp:=strgetfromindex(list,1); // zp (pointer) now points to the second item in the list

</code>


</div>
